_meta.description: Banking-language opportunity labels for nCino lending patterns.
_meta.note: Replace any value below with SME-approved text once SF-NC-4 is signed off.

LOAN_ORIGINATION_ROUTING_FRICTION.s6_title: Reduce loan origination delays with intelligent routing
LOAN_ORIGINATION_ROUTING_FRICTION.s6_desc: Automate underwriter assignment to eliminate manual routing delays and reduce origination cycle time.
LOAN_ORIGINATION_ROUTING_FRICTION.s9_roadmap: 30-day pilot: Implement intelligent routing for CRE and Commercial loans. Track reduction in stage handoffs and overall origination cycle time.
LOAN_ORIGINATION_ROUTING_FRICTION.s10_exec: Origination routing friction is adding days to your loan cycle. An AI routing agent can reduce handoffs and accelerate time-to-close.

COVENANT_TRACKING_GAP.s6_title: Automate covenant monitoring to eliminate compliance risk
COVENANT_TRACKING_GAP.s6_desc: Replace manual covenant tracking with automated alerts and compliance scoring to prevent breaches before they occur.
COVENANT_TRACKING_GAP.s9_roadmap: 30-day pilot: deploy covenant monitoring agent for top 20 commercial loans. Alerts surface to relationship manager — no automated credit decisions.
COVENANT_TRACKING_GAP.s10_exec: Overdue covenants create significant regulatory and credit risk. Automated monitoring and timely alerts to relationship managers help prevent breaches.
COVENANT_TRACKING_GAP.compliance_guardrail: Agent surfaces covenant alerts to relationship manager only. No automated credit decisions. Human escalation required.

CHECKLIST_BOTTLENECK.s6_title: Accelerate loan closing by resolving checklist bottlenecks
CHECKLIST_BOTTLENECK.s6_desc: Identify and resolve document checklist stalls that delay closing, reducing cycle time and improving borrower experience.
CHECKLIST_BOTTLENECK.s9_roadmap: 30-day pilot: deploy checklist monitoring for loans in closing stage. Measure: reduction in average overrun days and stalled checklist items.
CHECKLIST_BOTTLENECK.s10_exec: Document checklist delays are one of the most visible borrower frustrations. Resolving stalls in closing stage directly improves relationship outcomes.

SPREADING_BOTTLENECK.s6_title: Reduce financial spreading time with intelligent automation
SPREADING_BOTTLENECK.s6_desc: Identify and clear spreading backlogs by tracking unlocked periods and analyst workload to speed up credit analysis.
SPREADING_BOTTLENECK.s9_roadmap: 30-day pilot: deploy spreading backlog monitor for CRE portfolio. Measure: reduction in unlocked spread periods and analyst backlog days.
SPREADING_BOTTLENECK.s10_exec: Spreading backlogs delay credit decisions and frustrate commercial borrowers. Intelligent workload management can clear analyst queues and compress decision timelines.

APPROVAL_BOTTLENECK.s6_title: Accelerate credit approvals with intelligent workflow automation
APPROVAL_BOTTLENECK.s6_desc: Monitor approval cycle times and proactively escalate stalled approvals to reduce pending queue and improve decision velocity.
APPROVAL_BOTTLENECK.s9_roadmap: 30-day pilot: deploy approval monitoring for commercial loan pipeline. Escalation alerts go to credit committee — no automated decisions.
APPROVAL_BOTTLENECK.s10_exec: Stalled approvals are a leading cause of borrower attrition. Proactive escalation and cycle time monitoring can materially improve credit committee throughput.
APPROVAL_BOTTLENECK.compliance_guardrail: Agent monitors and escalates to credit committee only. No automated credit decisions. Human decision required.
